## How tested
<!-- Unit tests added/updated? Verified on a device? Which device + app? -->

- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest lintDebug assembleDebug` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for matching/engine/config changes
- [ ] No new use of screen capture / OCR / ML vision / root (accessibility-only)
- [ ] App-specific labels/ids live in config data, not in matching logic
